designSystem.style: Dark behavioral finance UI with soft purple/indigo primary, amber accent, teal success tones. Card-based layout with subtle glow borders, gradient highlights, and emotional color-coding (rose=stress/risk, amber=caution, teal/green=positive). Heavy use of micro-interactions, animated progress bars, and a behavioral coaching visual language.

screens: Home — Dashboard with spending pulse, trigger alert banner, mood check-in flow, stats grid, and recent transactions with mood tags
Triggers — Detected spending pattern cards with expandable details, risk levels, frequency stats, and shield setup CTA
Timeline — Emotional vs planned spending bar chart, 4-week trend summary, mood breakdown with spend amounts, life event tags
Shields — Active trigger guards with timer, routine, and delay types; real-time countdown; enable/disable toggles
Goals — Progress toward savings goals tied to trigger interruptions, reward claiming, and motivational coaching tips
